what_it_does: This file is a metadata attachment record that associates an attachment identifier with a channel and a specific board item target.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI referencing item-0dd8d3ce
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Follows the channel attachment record schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub tying a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-0dd8d3ce.
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to do exactly what an attachment record should do: record the link between an attachment and a board item.
intention_signals: It seems intended to persist the fact that a particular board item received an attachment during a channel conversation.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, structured association between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting auditability and cross-referencing.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file recording a 'board_items' attachment in the dragnet-development channel linked to board item item-0dd8d3ce.
intention_for_embedding: To capture and preserve the relationship between a channel attachment and its target board item.
